history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava (`L`), so moving forward is unsafe. A safe path to the goal at row 04 column D is to go down through row 03. Since I am facing right, I should first turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is a safe floor cell (`.`), and moving there advances toward a safe route around the lava to reach the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The cell ahead at row 04 column B is a safe floor cell (`.`). Moving there keeps me on the safe path toward the goal while avoiding the lava at row 04 column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead at row 05 column B is a wall (`#`), so I cannot move forward. The goal is at row 04 column D, and the cell to my left relative to my current facing is row 04 column C, which is lava, so I should begin turning to face the safe path back upward toward row 03 column B.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing left (`<`). The cell ahead at row 04 column A is a wall, so moving forward is not possible. The safe route is to go up to row 03 column B, which requires facing up from my current orientation. Turning right from left will make me face up.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up (`^`). The cell ahead at row 03 column B is a safe floor (`.`), and moving there brings me along the safe path toward the goal while avoiding the lava at row 04 column C.
</thought>
<action>

</action>

</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing up (`^`). The cell directly ahead at row 01 column B is a wall (`#`), so moving forward is not possible. To reach the goal at row 04 column D safely, I should turn right so I can head east along the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava (`L`), so moving forward would be deadly. I should turn right to face down, which points toward a safe open path through row 03.
</thought>

<thought>

</thought>

TURN_LEFT

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 04 column C is lava (`L`), so moving forward would be deadly. The only safe adjacent open cell is above at row 03 column B, so I should turn left to face up.
